_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Inhibition of p-ERK was pronounced in the skin (mean 94% inhibition) and sciatic nerve (mean 64% inhibition) of all minipigs after selumetinib treatment, dropping to nearly undetectable levels in the skin
details: Detected pronounced p-ERK inhibition in skin (mean 94% inhibition) and sciatic nerve (mean 64% inhibition) after selumetinib treatment
